title: What will you learn in this topic

content.problemStatement:
The next topic in our journey is Comparison / Relational operators where you will learn the following concepts.

- [Equal to Operator](https://www.codechef.com/learn/course/cpp-development/XEIBAY/problems/JVEMVM01)
- [Greater than Operator](https://www.codechef.com/learn/course/cpp-development/XEIBAY/problems/JVEMVM01B)
- [Greater than Operator](https://www.codechef.com/learn/course/cpp-development/XEIBAY/problems/JVEMVM06)
- [Less than](https://www.codechef.com/learn/course/cpp-development/XEIBAY/problems/JVEMVM06B)
- [Greater than or equal to Operator](https://www.codechef.com/learn/course/cpp-development/XEIBAY/problems/JVEMVM11)
- [less than equal to](https://www.codechef.com/learn/course/cpp-development/XEIBAY/problems/JVEMVM11B)
